message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker — bd-3dh.9 FlowMatrix now in_progress

Update bd-3dh.9 (FlowMatrix view mode) status from open to in_progress
to reflect the scaffolding work committed in this batch: ViewMode enum
variant, BvrApp state fields, and display name are now wired up,
with rendering and keybinding logic still to come.

Archive pre-change snapshot to .br_history for bead-level diffing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
